meta.name: Clan Leadership & Skool Community
meta.description: Community building, engagement, moderation, and member value missions for Skool platform management.

tasks.title: Create or Update Member Welcome Flow
tasks.subject: Member Onboarding
tasks.successCriteria: 5-step welcome flow published with links and first-win task
tasks.failureCondition: New members join without knowing what to do

steps.action: Review your current onboarding experience as a new member would see it
Write a simple 5-step welcome checklist (join → intro → first task → resources → ask)
Create a 'First Win' task that takes under 5 minutes to complete
Add links to 3 key posts, lessons, or resources for new members
Create a pinned welcome post with all onboarding information
Test the flow by asking a new or test member to go through it (3 min)
Add an auto-response for new members with welcome message (2 min)

tasks.notes: Keep the welcome flow short and action-oriented. New members should know their first 3 actions within 60 seconds of joining.

tasks.title: Publish One High-Value Daily Lesson Post
tasks.subject: Content Creation
tasks.successCriteria: Post with hook, 3 teaching points, action prompt, and reply to first comment

steps.action: Choose one concrete, actionable lesson from your expertise (3 min)
Write a hook sentence that creates curiosity or addresses a pain point (3 min)
Add 3 teaching bullets, each with a specific example (10 min)
Include 1 actionable prompt for members to apply the lesson (3 min)
Add a call-to-action asking for comments or questions (2 min)
Tag relevant members or use relevant hashtags (2 min)
Publish and immediately reply to the first comment (5 min)
Schedule a reminder to check back for comments in 2 hours (2 min)

tasks.notes: Daily lessons build trust and rhythm. Consistency beats perfection. If you miss a day, post a 'best of' recap instead.

tasks.title: Morning Moderation Check (15 min)
tasks.subject: Moderation
tasks.successCriteria: All new posts reviewed, spam removed, unanswered questions addressed
tasks.failureCondition: Leaving spam or unanswered questions in feed

steps.action: Scan all new posts from last 24 hours (5 min)
Remove or report any spam, self-promotion, or rule violations (2 min)
Identify posts with 0 replies and prioritize them (2 min)
Reply to at least 3 unanswered questions with helpful answers (4 min)
Pin or highlight 1 high-value post from yesterday (1 min)
Log any recurring issues or member concerns (1 min)

tasks.notes: Morning moderation sets the tone for the day. Members should wake up to a clean, engaged community.

tasks.title: Run a Full Weekly Challenge Cycle
tasks.subject: Weekly Challenges
tasks.successCriteria: Challenge launched Monday, 3 checkpoints, Friday recap with participant engagement
tasks.failureCondition: Challenge posted without follow-up or engagement

steps.action: Monday 9am: Define challenge goal, outcome, and daily prompts (20 min)
Monday 10am: Write clear instructions, rules, and submission format (15 min)
Monday 11am: Publish challenge post and pin to top (5 min)
Tuesday 10am: Post first checkpoint with progress prompts (10 min)
Wednesday 10am: Post second checkpoint with encouragement (10 min)
Thursday 10am: Post final checkpoint with submission reminder (10 min)
Engage with participant updates daily (20 min total across week)
Friday 3pm: Compile wins, highlights, and lessons learned (15 min)
Friday 4pm: Post end-of-week recap celebrating all participants (10 min)
Friday 5pm: Announce next week's challenge theme (5 min)

tasks.notes: Challenges create momentum and community identity. The recap is as important as the launch - celebrate every participant.

tasks.title: Spotlight One Member Win
tasks.subject: Retention & Value
tasks.successCriteria: One member win highlighted publicly with specific achievement
tasks.failureCondition: Wins go unnoticed or spotlight is too vague
tasks.reward: +20 XP, +10 coins, higher retention and morale
tasks.recoveryMission: Comment on 3 member posts with encouragement

steps.action: Review recent member posts, comments, and challenge submissions (5 min)
Identify one specific, genuine win (progress, insight, completion) (2 min)
Write a short spotlight post describing what they accomplished (4 min)
Tag the member and explain WHY their win matters (2 min)
Invite others to share their wins or congratulate in comments (1 min)
Pin or highlight the spotlight post for visibility (1 min)

tasks.notes: Spotlights build community culture. Specific praise ('You connected X and Y brilliantly') beats generic ('Great job').
